# importController

**Instance Property**

An instance of the controller object you use to test your import code.

## Declaration

```swift
var importController: AppMigrationTester.AppImportController { get async throws }
```

## Testing import

- **AppMigrationTester.AppImportController**: A class you use to test your extension’s import code.
